\vspace{-2cm}

\begin{questions}
  \question[8]
Machine: base 10, precision $d=2$. Let $\mathbb{F}$ be the representable set.

\begin{parts}
  \part What is $\epsilon_{\text{mach}}$?
  \begin{solution}
  $\boxed{0.01}$
  \end{solution}

  \part How many elements of $\mathbb{F}$ are in $[50,5000]$?
  \begin{solution}
  $[50,99.99]$ step $0.01$: $5000$; $[100,999.9]$ step $0.1$: $9000$; $[1000,5000]$ step $1$: $4001$. Total $\boxed{18001}$.
  \end{solution}

  \part What is the closest element of $\mathbb{F}$ to $\pi$?
  \begin{solution}
  $\boxed{3.14}$
  \end{solution}

  \part Give a stretch of 10 consecutive positive integers not in $\mathbb{F}$.
  \begin{solution}
  $\boxed{1001,1002,1003,1004,1005,1006,1007,1008,1009,1010}$
  \end{solution}
\end{parts}

\newpage
Let $a=0.565$, $b=0.678$, $c=0.234$.

\question[6]
$\mathrm{fl}(x)$ = nearest in $\mathbb{F}$ (round half up).

\begin{parts}
  \part $a + (b - c)$
  \begin{solution}
  $\mathrm{fl}(a)=0.57$, $\mathrm{fl}(b)=0.68$, $\mathrm{fl}(c)=0.23$.
  $b-c=0.45$; $a+(b-c)=1.02$; $\mathrm{fl}= \boxed{1.02}$.
  \end{solution}

  \part $(a + b) - c$
  \begin{solution}
  $\mathrm{fl}(a)=0.57$, $\mathrm{fl}(b)=0.68$, $\mathrm{fl}(c)=0.23$.
  $a+b=1.25$; $(a+b)-c=1.02$; $\mathrm{fl}= \boxed{1.02}$.
  \end{solution}
\end{parts}

\question[6]
$\mathrm{fl}(x)$ = truncation to $d=2$ digits.

\begin{parts}
  \part $a + (b - c)$
  \begin{solution}
  $\mathrm{fl}(a)=0.56$, $\mathrm{fl}(b)=0.67$, $\mathrm{fl}(c)=0.23$.
  $b-c=0.44$; $a+(b-c)=1.00$; $\mathrm{fl}= \boxed{1.00}$.
  \end{solution}

  \part $(a + b) - c$
  \begin{solution}
  $\mathrm{fl}(a)=0.56$, $\mathrm{fl}(b)=0.67$, $\mathrm{fl}(c)=0.23$.
  $a+b=1.23$; $(a+b)-c=1.00$; $\mathrm{fl}= \boxed{1.00}$.
  \end{solution}
\end{parts}

\end{questions}
\end{document}
